objective: Create an immutable raw-sample registry that records file hash, provenance, source-token status, and license-review state before any real provider sample can enter V3.78 or V3.75.
forbidden: Do not copy, normalize, or clean raw samples.
Do not run V3.78, V3.53, label generation, portfolio validation, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, portfolio-return, or model promotion outputs.
Do not mark V3.78 review allowed without source-token approval and license approval.
acceptance_criteria: Raw-sample registry is written even when no sample exists.
Hash and first-seen fields are recorded for any discovered sample.
License review queue and controlled handoff are produced.
Target source write and V3.78/V3.53 execution remain blocked.
V3.79 regression status is checked before the registry is accepted.
failure_conditions: The target CSV is written by this task.
Any raw sample is modified or copied into a controlled review path.
V3.78 or V3.53 is marked executable by this task.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion output scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: When a real sample arrives, attach license evidence, rerun V3.80, then run V3.78 only for registry-approved samples.
